text_original: Scholars of the highest class, when they hear about the Dao, earnestly carry it into practice. Scholars of the middle class, when they have heard about it, seem now to keep it and now to lose it. Scholars of the lowest class, when they have heard about it, laugh greatly at it. If it were not (thus) laughed at, it would not be fit to be the Dao.
text_normalized: Scholars of the highest class, when they hear about the Dao, earnestly carry it into practice. Scholars of the middle class, when they have heard about it, seem now to keep it and now to lose it. Scholars of the lowest class, when they have heard about it, laugh greatly at it. If it were not (thus) laughed at, it would not be fit to be the Dao.

text_original: Therefore the sentence-makers have thus expressed themselves:
text_normalized: Therefore the sentence-makers have thus expressed themselves:

text_original: 'The Dao, when brightest seen, seems light to lack;
text_normalized: 'The Dao, when brightest seen, seems light to lack;

text_original: Who progress in it makes, seems drawing back;
text_normalized: Who progress in it makes, seems drawing back;

text_original: Its even way is like a rugged track.
text_normalized: Its even way is like a rugged track.

text_original: Its highest virtue from the vale doth rise;
text_normalized: Its highest virtue from the vale doth rise;

text_original: Its greatest beauty seems to offend the eyes;
text_normalized: Its greatest beauty seems to offend the eyes;

text_original: And he has most whose lot the least supplies.
text_normalized: And he has most whose lot the least supplies.

text_original: Its firmest virtue seems but poor and low;
text_normalized: Its firmest virtue seems but poor and low;

text_original: Its solid truth seems change to undergo;
text_normalized: Its solid truth seems change to undergo;

text_original: Its largest square doth yet no corner show
text_normalized: Its largest square doth yet no corner show

text_original: A vessel great, it is the slowest made;
text_normalized: A vessel great, it is the slowest made;

text_original: Loud is its sound, but never word it said;
text_normalized: Loud is its sound, but never word it said;

text_original: A semblance great, the shadow of a shade.'
text_normalized: A semblance great, the shadow of a shade.'

text_original: The Dao is hidden, and has no name; but it is the Dao which is skilful at imparting (to all things what they need) and making them complete.
text_normalized: The Dao is hidden, and has no name; but it is the Dao which is skilful at imparting (to all things what they need) and making them complete.
